description: DHS infographic from the AI 'Roles and Responsibilities Framework' series, in landscape format on a blue gradient background. A bold white centered title reads 'CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE OWNERS AND OPERATORS', with an italic white subtitle: 'Manage and maintain essential systems like energy, water, and transportation that increasingly rely on AI.' A thin horizontal connector line with a node leads to three white framed flat illustration panels, each with a light blue label tab: (1) 'Energy Infrastructure', a wind turbine, electrical transmission towers and power lines, solar panels, and a substation against a faint cityscape; (2) 'Water Infrastructure', a water treatment plant with tanks, solar paneled roofs, greenery and a tanker truck; (3) 'Transportation Infrastructure', a city intersection with cars, a bus, a truck, traffic signals and connectivity icons. A blue footer bar carries white text: 'The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages these operators to deploy AI in ways that protect system integrity and public safety, balancing innovation with security.' The DHS seal is at the bottom right. The panels use vector illustrations.
notable_text: CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE OWNERS AND OPERATORS; Energy Infrastructure; Water Infrastructure; Transportation Infrastructure; The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages these operators to deploy AI in ways that protect system integrity and public safety, balancing innovation with security.
